Actions.HITL.label: Create action app task
Actions.HITL.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:UserTask id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:activity version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Actions.HITL" version="v1" />
      <uipath:context>
        <uipath:input name="appId" value="{appId}" />
        <uipath:input name="appVersion" value="{appVersion}" />
        <uipath:input name="actions" value="{actions}" />
        <uipath:input name="key" value="{key}" />
        <uipath:input name="taskTitle" value="{taskTitle}" />
      </uipath:context>
      <uipath:input name="HitlTaskArguments" type="json" target="bodyField"><![CDATA[{}]]></uipath:input>
      <uipath:output name="Process response" type="Actions.HITL" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:UserTask>
Actions.HITL.discoveryNotes: Uses getSupportedHumanTasks(search, systemName) to list available action app tasks
Actions.HITL.contextFieldNotes: Note: 'folderKey' field in design schema has name='key' (the actual XML context input name)

Orchestrator.StartJob.label: Start and wait for RPA workflow
Orchestrator.StartJob.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:ServiceTask id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:activity version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Orchestrator.StartJob" version="v1" />
      <uipath:context>
        <uipath:input name="releaseKey" value="{releaseKey}" />
        <uipath:input name="folderId" value="{folderId}" />
        <uipath:input name="folderPath" value="{folderPath}" />
        <uipath:input name="name" value="{name}" />
      </uipath:context>
      <uipath:input name="JobArguments" type="json" target="bodyField"><![CDATA[{}]]></uipath:input>
      <uipath:output name="Process response" type="Orchestrator.RunJob" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:ServiceTask>
Orchestrator.StartJob.discoveryNotes: Uses getSupportedOrchestratorTasks('process', search) to list available processes

Orchestrator.StartAgentJob.label: Start and wait for agent
Orchestrator.StartAgentJob.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:ServiceTask id="{id}" name="{name}">

      <uipath:context>
        <uipath:input name="releaseKey" value="{releaseKey}" />
        <uipath:input name="folderId" value="{folderId}" />
        <uipath:input name="folderPath" value="{folderPath}" />
        <uipath:input name="name" value="{name}" />
      </uipath:context>
      <uipath:input name="JobArguments" type="json" target="bodyField"><![CDATA[{}]]></uipath:input>
      <uipath:output name="Process response" type="Orchestrator.RunJob" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:ServiceTask>
Orchestrator.StartAgentJob.discoveryNotes: Uses getSupportedOrchestratorTasks('agent', search) to list available agents

Orchestrator.BusinessRules.label: Execute business rule [Preview]
Orchestrator.BusinessRules.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:BusinessRuleTask id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:activity version="v1">

        <uipath:input name="folderId" value="{folderId}" />
        <uipath:input name="folderPath" value="{folderPath}" />
        <uipath:input name="name" value="{name}" />
      </uipath:context>
      <uipath:input name="JobArguments" type="json" target="bodyField"><![CDATA[{}]]></uipath:input>
      <uipath:output name="Execute business rule [Preview]" type="Orchestrator.BusinessRules" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>

</bpmn:BusinessRuleTask>
Orchestrator.BusinessRules.discoveryNotes: Uses getOrchestratorBusinessRules() to list available business rules

Intsvc.ActivityExecution.label: Execute connector activity
Intsvc.ActivityExecution.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:SendTask id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:activity version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Intsvc.ActivityExecution" version="v1" />
      <uipath:context>
        <uipath:input name="activity" value="{activity}" />
        <uipath:input name="connectorKey" value="{connectorKey}" />
        <uipath:input name="connection" value="=bindings.{bindingId}" />
        <uipath:input name="folderKey" value="{folderKey}" />
        <uipath:input name="method" value="{method}" />
        <uipath:input name="path" value="{path}" />
      </uipath:context>
      <uipath:input name="body" type="json" target="body"><![CDATA[{}]]></uipath:input>
      <uipath:output name="result" type="custom" source="." var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:SendTask>
Intsvc.ActivityExecution.discoveryNotes: Uses getConnectorConnections(connectorKey) to list available connections. Activity/connector metadata comes from Integration Service catalog.
Intsvc.ActivityExecution.inputNotes: isSplitInputs=false in design schema; inputs are sent as separate <uipath:input> elements, not merged into a single JSON body
Intsvc.ActivityExecution.extensionTagNotes: In isExecution array, NOT in isEvents array, so uses uipath:activity

Intsvc.HttpExecution.label: Execute HTTP request (Legacy)
Intsvc.HttpExecution.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:SendTask id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:activity version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Intsvc.HttpExecution" version="v1" />
      <uipath:context>
        <uipath:input name="mode" value="manual" />
        <uipath:input name="method" value="GET" />
        <uipath:input name="url" value="=bindings.{bindingId}" />
        <uipath:input name="headers" value="=bindings.{bindingId}" />
        <uipath:input name="parameters" value="=bindings.{bindingId}" />
        <uipath:input name="body" value="=bindings.{bindingId}" />
      </uipath:context>
      <uipath:output name="response" type="jsonSchema" source="=response" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:SendTask>
Intsvc.HttpExecution.inputNotes: No jsonBody in design schema input section; all configuration is in context fields

Intsvc.UnifiedHttpRequest.label: Execute HTTP request
Intsvc.UnifiedHttpRequest.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:SendTask id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:activity version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Intsvc.UnifiedHttpRequest" version="v1" />
      <uipath:context>
        <uipath:input name="mode" value="manual" />
        <uipath:input name="method" value="GET" />
        <uipath:input name="url" value="=bindings.{bindingId}" />
        <uipath:input name="headers" value="=bindings.{bindingId}" />
        <uipath:input name="parameters" value="=bindings.{bindingId}" />
        <uipath:input name="body" value="=bindings.{bindingId}" />
      </uipath:context>
      <uipath:output name="response" type="jsonSchema" source="=response" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:SendTask>
Intsvc.UnifiedHttpRequest.inputNotes: In the isExecution array. Despite the design schema having no jsonBody, inputs are managed by the IS connector framework and serialized as separate <uipath:input> elements. The design schema context fields (mode, method, url, headers, parameters, body) are used for the HttpRequestV2Properties panel.
Intsvc.UnifiedHttpRequest.contextFieldNotes: Context fields above come from the legacy design schema (shared with Intsvc.HttpExecution). In the FPS ImplementationSection, this type is routed through IntsvcActivityProperties (IS connector framework), NOT HttpRequestProperties. The IS connector auto-initializes with HTTP_ACTIVITY_CONFIG and manages context dynamically. When used via the uipath.http-request shortcut node, it uses HttpRequestV2Properties which manages these context fields directly.
Intsvc.UnifiedHttpRequest.extensionTagNotes: In isExecution array, uses uipath:activity. Shares design schema with Intsvc.HttpExecution but uses IS connector framework at runtime.

Intsvc.WaitForEvent.label: Wait for connector event
Intsvc.WaitForEvent.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:ReceiveTask id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:event version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Intsvc.WaitForEvent" version="v1" />
      <uipath:output name="result" type="custom" source="." var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:event>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:ReceiveTask>
Intsvc.WaitForEvent.discoveryNotes: Uses getConnectorConnections(connectorKey) to list available connections
Intsvc.WaitForEvent.inputNotes: isSplitInputs=false; inputs are defined in input.fields (not jsonBody). Sent as separate <uipath:input> elements.
Intsvc.WaitForEvent.contextFieldNotes: Context fields are empty in design schema; all field definitions are in inputFields below

inputFields.name: connectionId
inputFields.description: Connection ID for the IS connector (bindable)

inputFields.name: connectorKey
inputFields.description: Integration Service connector identifier

inputFields.name: folderId
inputFields.description: Folder ID for the connector connection

inputFields.name: folderPath
inputFields.description: Folder path for the connector connection

inputFields.name: folderKey
inputFields.description: Folder key for the connector connection

inputFields.name: operation
inputFields.description: Connector event operation to wait for

inputFields.name: objectName
inputFields.description: Object name associated with the event trigger

inputFields.name: filter
inputFields.description: Filter criteria for the event

inputFields.name: parameters
inputFields.description: Additional parameters for the event

Intsvc.EventTrigger.label: Wait for connector event (trigger)
Intsvc.EventTrigger.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:StartEvent id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:event version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Intsvc.EventTrigger" version="v1" />
      <uipath:output name="result" type="custom" source="." var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:event>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:messageEventDefinition />
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:StartEvent>
Intsvc.EventTrigger.discoveryNotes: Uses getConnectorConnections(connectorKey) to list available connections
Intsvc.EventTrigger.inputNotes: isSplitInputs=false; inputs defined in input.fields. Sent as separate <uipath:input> elements.
Intsvc.EventTrigger.contextFieldNotes: Context fields are empty in design schema; all field definitions are in inputFields below

inputFields.name: connectionId
inputFields.description: Connection ID for the IS connector (bindable)

inputFields.name: connectorKey
inputFields.description: Integration Service connector identifier

inputFields.name: folderId
inputFields.description: Folder ID for the connector connection

inputFields.name: folderPath
inputFields.description: Folder path for the connector connection

inputFields.name: folderKey
inputFields.description: Folder key for the connector connection

inputFields.name: operation
inputFields.description: Connector event operation to trigger on

inputFields.name: objectName
inputFields.description: Object name associated with the event trigger

inputFields.name: filter
inputFields.description: Filter criteria for the event trigger

inputFields.name: parameters
inputFields.description: Additional parameters for the event trigger

    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:CallActivity>
Orchestrator.StartCaseMgmtProcess.discoveryNotes: Uses getSupportedOrchestratorTasks('caseManagement', search, 0, 100, true) to list available case management processes

Orchestrator.StartCaseMgmtProcessAsync.label: Start case management
Orchestrator.StartCaseMgmtProcessAsync.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:CallActivity id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:activity version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Orchestrator.StartCaseMgmtProcessAsync" version="v1" />
      <uipath:context>
        <uipath:input name="releaseKey" value="{releaseKey}" />
        <uipath:input name="folderId" value="{folderId}" />
        <uipath:input name="folderPath" value="{folderPath}" />
        <uipath:input name="name" value="{name}" />
      </uipath:context>
      <uipath:input name="JobArguments" type="json" target="bodyField"><![CDATA[{}]]></uipath:input>
      <uipath:output name="Process response" type="Orchestrator.RunJob" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:CallActivity>
Orchestrator.StartCaseMgmtProcessAsync.discoveryNotes: Uses getSupportedOrchestratorTasks('caseManagement', search, 0, 100, true) to list available case management processes

A2A.AgentExecution.label: Start and wait for A2A agent
A2A.AgentExecution.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:ServiceTask id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:activity version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="A2A.AgentExecution" version="v1" />
      <uipath:input name="body" type="json" target="body"><![CDATA[{}]]></uipath:input>
      <uipath:output name="a2aResponse" type="A2A.AgentExecution" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:ServiceTask>
A2A.AgentExecution.inputFieldNotes: Auto-initialized by A2AFPSFormControl on load. Version is set to v2. Outputs include a2aResponse (jsonSchema with A2A response schema, source=result) and Error (any, source=Error).
A2A.AgentExecution.outputNotes: Output schema includes: isSuccess (boolean), response (string), sessionId (string), status (string), taskId (string), artifacts (array of {index, parts, metadata}). Also includes Error output (type=any, source=Error).

inputFields.name: agentUrl
inputFields.description: URL of the A2A agent endpoint

inputFields.name: skillId
inputFields.description: Identifier for the specific skill to invoke on the agent

inputFields.name: input
inputFields.description: Input text/message to send to the A2A agent

inputFields.name: authToken
inputFields.description: Authentication token for the A2A agent

inputFields.name: agentName
inputFields.description: Display name of the A2A agent

BPMN.Variables.label: BPMN Variables
BPMN.Variables.inputNotes: Variable mappings use uipath:mapping with direct input/output elements, not a jsonBody pattern
BPMN.Variables.bpmnElementNotes: Also used on bpmn:StartEvent and bpmn:EndEvent for variable mappings. On bpmn:Task with no serviceType, defaults to BPMN.Variables.
BPMN.Variables.extensionTagNotes: Uses uipath:mapping (not uipath:activity). createExtensionTask checks for serviceType=BPMN.Variables on StartEvent/EndEvent/Task and routes to createModdleExtensionVariableMapping.

BPMN.ScriptTask.label: Execute script
BPMN.ScriptTask.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:ScriptTask id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:mapping version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="BPMN.ScriptTask" version="v1" />
      <uipath:input name="args" type="json" target="bodyField"><![CDATA[{}]]></uipath:input>
    </uipath:mapping>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:ScriptTask>
BPMN.ScriptTask.inputNotes: Inputs are merged into a single json input named 'args' with target 'bodyField'. An inputSchema is created from the input variables.
BPMN.ScriptTask.extensionTagNotes: bpmn:ScriptTask is routed through createModdleExtensionVariableMapping (same as BPMN.Variables). Inputs are merged into a single 'args' JSON body with inputSchema.

Intsvc.TimerTrigger.label: Timer trigger
Intsvc.TimerTrigger.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:StartEvent id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:activity version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Intsvc.TimerTrigger" version="v1" />
      <uipath:output name="result" type="custom" source="." var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:timerEventDefinition><bpmn:timeDuration xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">PT1H</bpmn:timeDuration></bpmn:timerEventDefinition>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:StartEvent>
Intsvc.TimerTrigger.inputNotes: No jsonBody, no input fields, no isSplitInputs in design schema
Intsvc.TimerTrigger.bpmnElementNotes: Used via timer event definition on start events; not directly in FPS_TO_NODE_MAPPING
Intsvc.TimerTrigger.extensionTagNotes: NOT in isEvents array, uses uipath:activity. However, isIntsvcTriggerDesignSchemaType returns true.

Maestro.ReceiveMessageEvent.label: Receive internal message
Maestro.ReceiveMessageEvent.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:IntermediateCatchEvent id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:event version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Maestro.ReceiveMessageEvent" version="v1" />
      <uipath:context>
        <uipath:input name="name" value="{name}" />
        <uipath:input name="_label" value="{_label}" />
      </uipath:context>
      <uipath:input name="ItemData" type="json" target="body"><![CDATA[{}]]></uipath:input>
      <uipath:output name="response" type="Maestro.ReceiveMessageEvent" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:event>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:messageEventDefinition />
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:IntermediateCatchEvent>
Maestro.ReceiveMessageEvent.inputNotes: isSplitInputs=true in design schema but NOT in isSplitInputsEvents code array, so inputs are NOT merged into ItemData for this type. They remain separate.

inputFields.name: Reference
inputFields.description: Correlation reference to match this receive event to its sender

Maestro.SendMessageEvent.label: Send internal message
Maestro.SendMessageEvent.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:IntermediateThrowEvent id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:event version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Maestro.SendMessageEvent" version="v1" />
      <uipath:context>
        <uipath:input name="name" value="{name}" />
        <uipath:input name="_label" value="{_label}" />
        <uipath:input name="inputSchema" value="{inputSchema}" />
      </uipath:context>
      <uipath:input name="ItemData" type="json" target="body"><![CDATA[{"Reference":"","SpecificContent":{},"Error":"","TimeToLive":""}]]></uipath:input>
      <uipath:output name="response" type="Maestro.SendMessageEvent" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:event>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:messageEventDefinition />
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:IntermediateThrowEvent>
Maestro.SendMessageEvent.inputNotes: In isSplitInputsEvents array. Inputs are merged into a single ItemData JSON body at serialization time. Uses SEND_MESSAGE_EVENT_INPUT_SCHEMA as the inputSchema.

inputFields.name: Reference
inputFields.description: Correlation reference to match this send event to its receiver

inputFields.name: SpecificContent
inputFields.description: JSON payload with the message content

inputFields.name: TimeToLive
inputFields.description: Duration after which the message expires if not consumed

Maestro.CaseRulesEvaluator.label: Case rules evaluator
Maestro.CaseRulesEvaluator.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:ServiceTask id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:activity version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Maestro.CaseRulesEvaluator" version="v1" />
      <uipath:context>
        <uipath:input name="caseDeterministicRules" value="{caseDeterministicRules}" />
        <uipath:input name="caseCurrentExecutionState" value="{caseCurrentExecutionState}" />
        <uipath:input name="_label" value="{_label}" />
      </uipath:context>
      <uipath:input name="caseManagerInput" type="json" target="body"><![CDATA[{}]]></uipath:input>
      <uipath:output name="schedulerOutput" type="Maestro.CaseRulesEvaluator" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:ServiceTask>
Maestro.CaseRulesEvaluator.bpmnElementNotes: Not in FPS_TO_NODE_MAPPING activity section; used internally for case management processes. Likely bpmn:ServiceTask or bpmn:Task.

Maestro.CaseManagerGuardrails.label: Case manager guardrails
Maestro.CaseManagerGuardrails.xmlTemplate:
<bpmn:ServiceTask id="{id}" name="{name}">
  <bpmn:extensionElements>
    <uipath:activity version="v1">
      <uipath:type value="Maestro.CaseManagerGuardrails" version="v1" />
      <uipath:context>
        <uipath:input name="decisions" value="{decisions}" />
        <uipath:input name="_label" value="{_label}" />
      </uipath:context>
      <uipath:input name="body" type="json" target="body"><![CDATA[{}]]></uipath:input>
      <uipath:output name="guardrailsOutput" type="Maestro.CaseManagerGuardrails" var="{varId}" />
    </uipath:activity>
  </bpmn:extensionElements>
  <bpmn:incoming>{incomingEdge}</bpmn:incoming>
  <bpmn:outgoing>{outgoingEdge}</bpmn:outgoing>
</bpmn:ServiceTask>
Maestro.CaseManagerGuardrails.bpmnElementNotes: Not in FPS_TO_NODE_MAPPING activity section; used internally for case management processes. Likely bpmn:ServiceTask or bpmn:Task.

extensionTagResolution.description: How the frontend determines which XML extension tag to use
rules: If serviceType is in isEvents array [Intsvc.WaitForEvent, Intsvc.EventTrigger, Maestro.ReceiveMessageEvent, Maestro.SendMessageEvent] => uipath:event
If serviceType is BPMN.Variables on bpmn:StartEvent, bpmn:EndEvent, or bpmn:Task => uipath:mapping
If nodeType is bpmn:ScriptTask or bpmn:SubProcess => uipath:mapping
